untranslatable_reason: Gap patterns (breakaway, continuation, exhaustion, island reversal) require explicit gap detection logic (price discontinuity between prev_close and open) and trend position analysis not directly available in allowed indicators. Volume pattern analysis relative to gap type classification requires domain-specific pattern recognition beyond simple indicator comparisons. Success rates and exact failure thresholds marked AUTHOR_SILENT cannot be parameterized.
translation_notes: Approximated entry as large gap (close vs prev_close with elevated volume relative to 20-day historical volatility). Exit set to gap closure pattern (price returning toward prior range). Hold period set to 7 days per exhaustion gap typical closure timeframe. True gap pattern identification requires custom pattern detection beyond allowed indicator set.
